title: Recover tempo after a failed gank
body: After a failed gank, the next priority is usually to recover camp tempo rather than forcing a second action. A lot of jungle games collapse because one low-value play becomes two low-value plays in a row.
actionables: After a failed gank, ask whether returning to route is worth more than forcing another lane touch.
Review the first detour that breaks your first or second clear.
Use camp tempo as the default unless lane priority actually changed.

source.title: Jungle tempo examples
source.notes: Template card to show the expected format.
